betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6ME Fluid Interface§f:
The §6ME Fluid Interface §f(appliedenergistics2:fluid_interface) is the §efluid equivalent of the ME Interface§f. It bridges the ME network with external fluid tanks, pipes, and processing machines, transferring fluids on the §6Fluid Channel§f of the network.

§6Production Path (network/blocks/interfaces_fluid.json)§f:
Pattern "aba / c d / aba" with the following key ingredients:
- §ba§f: §6Iron Ingot§f (ingotIron) — 4 in the corners
- §bb§f: §6Lapis Lazuli§f dye cluster (any §6Lapis Dust§f or §6Blue Dye§f ore_dict) at the middle of left and right columns
- §cc§f: §6Annihilation Core§f (appliedenergistics2:material:44) at the middle of the left column
- §cd§f: §6Formation Core§f (appliedenergistics2:material:43) at the center
- Yields 1× ME Fluid Interface

§6Function§f:
- §bFluid push§f: pump fluids from the network into an adjacent tank
- §bFluid pull§f: drain fluids from an adjacent tank into the network
- §bInternal buffer§f: 9 fluid tanks for temporary storage
- §bProcessing patterns§f: §6fluid processing patterns§f automate the Fluid Interface
- §bRedstone control§f: behaviour toggled via redstone signal

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 8 items related to the Fluid Interface:
- §6Fluid Storage Bus§f (appliedenergistics2:part:221)
- §6Fluid Import Bus§f (appliedenergistics2:part:241)
- §6Fluid Export Bus§f (appliedenergistics2:part:261)
- §6Fluid Annihilation Plane§f (appliedenergistics2:part:302)
- §6Fluid Formation Plane§f (appliedenergistics2:part:302)
- §6Fluid Level Emitter§f (appliedenergistics2:part:281)
- §6Fluid Terminal§f (appliedenergistics2:part:520)
- §6Fluid Interface §f(part variant)

§6Fluid Channel Architecture (BlockInterface.java:80)§f:
- The §6ME Controller§f powers a §6separate fluid channel§f alongside the item channel
- §6Dense Cables§f provide §b32 channels§f total; for most setups, dedicating §b8 channels§f to fluids is enough
- §eTip§f: place a §6ME Fluid Interface§f directly on a §6ME Drive§f with a §6Fluid Storage Cell§f to route water from mining drills back into the network
- §cWarning§f: the Fluid Interface does §cnot§f autocraft fluids unless paired with a §6ME Pattern Terminal§f and §6Crafting CPU§f
